stock_uncle_insight.date_header: 6/26 法人與主力大戶主要買超股票

buyer_groups.group_title: 1. 外資大戶：狂掃航空與傳產，避險兼卡位

stocks.description: 肖年仔，外資狂掃 5.2 萬張華航，這擺明是看好暑假旺季題材，準備拉高出貨給散戶接刀。這不是真外資長線佈局，是短線炒作的訊號啦！
外資敲進 3.9 萬張台塑，傳產龍頭股，在大盤震盪時，外資把資金轉進這種低波動的權值股，當作資金避風港，穩穩賺，但別期待噴出。
外資買超 2.3 萬張合庫金，金融股是外資在避險時的愛股，殖利率高、波動小，進可攻退可守，但投信卻在賣部分金融，有點對作，肖年仔要看清楚。
外資也買進 1.3 萬張長榮航，跟華航一樣，航空雙雄一起被外資鎖定，旺季題材發酵，但也要小心高檔倒貨，別當最後一隻老鼠。
外資買超 1.1 萬張聯電，但投信卻大賣 2.6 萬張，自營商小買，這檔外資跟投信在對作，主力意圖不明，肖年仔們風險較高，別黑白買。

buyer_groups.group_title: 2. 投信大戶（本土國家隊）：作帳行情啟動，鎖定金融與記憶體

stocks.description: 投信狂敲 3.7 萬張華邦電，記憶體族群最近有題材，投信這是在作帳，準備拉抬衝績效，肖年仔們可以觀察，但別傻傻追高被割韭菜。
投信買超 3.2 萬張兆豐金，永豐金、華南金、玉山金、第一金也都在買超榜上，投信這波是集體鎖定金融股，準備年底作帳，跟外資在部分金融股上對作，這就是法人之間的心理戰。
投信買超 3.0 萬張永豐金，金融股是投信作帳的常客，穩健好拉，但外資卻在賣玉山金、兆豐金，這盤面很複雜，別亂猜。
投信買超 1.5 萬張南亞科，跟華邦電一樣，記憶體雙雄都被投信看上，這波作帳行情，記憶體是重點之一，但也要小心投信結帳倒貨。

buyer_groups.group_title: 3. 內資主力與實戶：短線操作，面板與聯電成焦點

stocks.description: 自營商買超 4,086 張聯電，外資買投信賣，自營商這小咖也來湊熱鬧，可能是避險盤或短線套利，意圖不明，肖年仔們別亂跟。
自營商買超 3,084 張三商壽，壽險股有時會被自營商當作避險標的，或是看好特定題材，但量不大，參考就好，別太認真。
自營商買超 2,367 張群創，面板股最近有轉機題材，自營商這是在卡位，看能不能搭上順風車，但肖年仔們要小心，面板股波動大，接刀要小心。
自營商也買超 2,121 張華航，跟外資一起買航空股，這表示航空股的旺季題材確實吸引短線資金，但也要小心隔日沖，別被倒貨。

strategies.strategy_title: 策略一：高檔避險與資金避風港（金融、航空、傳產）
strategies.strategy_content: 肖年仔，外資在大盤高檔震盪時，把資金從部分科技股（如力積電、旺宏）撤出，轉進波動較小、殖利率較高的金融股（合庫金、臺企銀、彰銀、元大金）以及具旺季題材的航空股（華航、長榮航）。同時，傳產龍頭股（台塑、台泥、台玻）也成為資金避風港，顯示外資在尋求穩健收益，降低整體投資組合風險。這不是看壞大盤，而是資金輪動的避險操作，肖年仔們要學會看懂這種避險盤。

strategies.strategy_title: 策略二：投信作帳行情啟動（金融、記憶體）
strategies.strategy_content: 本土投信大戶展現強烈作帳意圖，大舉買進金融股（兆豐金、永豐金、華南金、玉山金、第一金）和記憶體族群（華邦電、南亞科）。金融股因其穩定性與高殖利率，常是投信年底衝刺績效的標的。記憶體則因產業景氣有望復甦，成為投信提前卡位的重點。這波操作顯示投信在為季底或年底結帳做準備，肖年仔們要留意這些被鎖碼的標的，但別傻傻追高。

strategies.strategy_title: 策略三：法人對作與短線套利（聯電、部分金融）
strategies.strategy_content: 聯電出現外資買、投信大賣的法人對作現象，自營商則小幅買進。這顯示市場對聯電的看法分歧，外資可能看好其成熟製程的穩定性，而投信則可能在調整持股或獲利了結。此外，外資賣超玉山金、兆豐金、永豐金、華南金，但投信卻大買這些金融股，這也是典型的法人對作。這種情況下，股價容易震盪，短線主力會趁機套利，肖年仔們要小心別被洗出場，更別去接這種刀。

stock_uncle_insight.summary: 肖年仔，看清楚了沒？外資在避險，把錢往航空跟傳產、部分金融塞，投信這群本土國家隊則在作帳，狂掃金融跟記憶體。法人對作的股票，別傻傻去接刀，小心被割韭菜！這盤面就是資金輪動，高檔震盪，穩健為上！

top_brokerages_analysis.uncle_logic: 這外資大咖狂掃華航，擺明就是看好航空雙雄的暑假旺季題材，準備拉高出貨給散戶接刀，這不是真外資長線佈局，是短線炒作的訊號啦！
凱基台北這分點，肖年仔們都知道是隔日沖大本營。今天買聯電，明天八成就是準備倒貨給追高的韭菜，小心別去接刀啊！
元大投信這本土國家隊，狂敲華邦電，擺明就是投信作帳行情又來了。記憶體族群最近有題材，他們趁機拉抬，準備年底結帳衝績效。
摩根大通這外資大咖，狂倒力積電，跟外資整體賣超力積電的動作一致。這擺明是外資在撤出部分半導體資金，肖年仔們別傻傻去接這種倒貨盤。

english_professor_news.title: NVIDIA (NVDA) Projects $1 Trillion in AI Infrastructure Demand By 2027

level1_blind.text:
The above button links to Coinbase. Yahoo Finance is not a broker-dealer or investment adviser and does not offer securities or cryptocurrencies for sale or facilitate trading. Coinbase pays us for certain activity generated through this link. Prices displayed are informational.

Antipodes Partners published its 「Antipodes Global Strategy」 first-quarter 2026 investor letter, highlighting the key performance stocks, portfolio changes, and the market outlook. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The first quarter of 2026 was highly volatile. Early optimism shifted to a historic energy shock caused by US-Israeli strikes on Iran. Global equities dropped 3.2% in USD, with US equities falling 4.6%, and value stocks outperformed growth stocks as the rotation away from mega-cap tech accelerated due to AI fears. The strategy outperformed the benchmark over the quarter and the 12 months to March 31, 2026. Exposure in North America, Korea, Western Europe, and Latin America regions boosted performance, while Canada and the UK lagged. Energy, consumer discretionary, industrials, and healthcare sectors led the performance, while financials, real estate, and materials lagged. To manage risk, the firm increased its holdings in defensive sectors during the quarter. For insights into their key selections for 2026, please review the Strategy's top five holdings.

In its first-quarter 2026 investor letter, Antipodes Global Value Strategy highlighted NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA). NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) is a leading data center-scale AI infrastructure company that operates through Compute & Networking and Graphics segments. On June 24, 2026, NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) stock closed at $198.91 per share. One-month return of NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) was -8.76%, and its shares gained 26.10% over the past 52 weeks. NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) has a market capitalization of $4.74 trillion.

Antipodes Global Value Strategy stated the following regarding NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) in its Q1 2026 investor letter:

「NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA): The opportunity in NVIDIA has been created from the market's extrapolation of near-term AI uncertainty, despite a structural demand inflection for the world's dominant AI infrastructure provider. On our estimates NVDA trades on a 2027 multiple of 13x. Management now guides at least $1 trillion in AI infrastructure demand through 2027 — double the $500bn signalled twelve months ago — and frames this as a floor with NVDA the main beneficiary underpinned by the CUDA installed base. Revenue is also diversifying beyond hyperscalers, with sovereign clouds, enterprise, and robotics growing while the SaaS-to-agentic transition represents a further enterprise IT monetisation opportunity.」

NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) is in fourth position on our list of 40 Most Popular Stocks Among Hedge Funds Heading Into 2026. According to our database, 275 hedge fund portfolios held NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) at the end of the fourth quarter, compared to 264 in the previous quarter. In the first quarter of fiscal year 2027, NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ: NVDA) reported revenues of $82 billion, achieving an impressive 85% year-over-year growth. While we acknowledge the potential of NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. If you're looking for an extremely undervalued AI stock that also stands to benefit significantly from Trump-era tariffs and the onshoring trend, see our free report on the best short-term AI stock.

In another article, we covered NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) and shared the list of best AI chip stocks to buy for the long term. In addition, please check out our hedge fund investor letters Q1 2026 page for more investor letters from hedge funds and other leading investors.

READ NEXT: 33 Stocks That Should Double in 3 Years and 15 Stocks That Will Make You Rich in 10 Years.

level2_keywords.meaning: 人工智慧基礎設施，指的是支援AI運算所需的硬體（如GPU）、軟體、網路與資料中心等整體架構。
level2_keywords.example: 「NVIDIA is a leading data center-scale AI infrastructure company.」

level2_keywords.meaning: 投資人信函，通常是基金經理人或公司高層定期向股東或潛在投資人發布的報告，說明投資策略、績效與市場展望。
level2_keywords.example: 「Antipodes Partners published its first-quarter 2026 investor letter.」

level2_keywords.meaning: 市值，指一家上市公司所有流通股的總價值，計算方式是股價乘以總股數，是衡量公司規模的重要指標。
level2_keywords.example: 「NVIDIA Corporation has a market capitalization of $4.74 trillion.」

level2_keywords.meaning: 需求拐點，指市場對某產品或服務的需求從一個趨勢轉向另一個趨勢的關鍵時刻，通常意味著需求將大幅增長。
level2_keywords.example: 「The market is seeing a structural demand inflection for AI infrastructure.」

level2_keywords.meaning: 超大規模雲端服務供應商，指那些擁有龐大資料中心和運算能力，提供雲端服務的巨頭企業，例如AWS、Microsoft Azure、Google Cloud等。
level2_keywords.example: 「Revenue is also diversifying beyond hyperscalers, with sovereign clouds, enterprise, and robotics growing.」

english_professor_news.level2_context: 各位同學，這篇新聞的重點是全球AI晶片龍頭NVIDIA（輝達）對未來AI市場的超樂觀預期。一家投資管理公司Antipodes Partners在其2026年第一季的投資人信函中，特別點出NVIDIA的潛力。NVIDIA管理層現在預估，到2027年，全球AI基礎設施的需求將達到至少1兆美元，這比他們一年前預估的5千億美元直接翻倍！這背後的原因是AI技術的爆炸性成長，從大型雲端服務商（hyperscalers）到主權雲、企業應用，甚至是機器人領域，對AI運算能力的需求都在飆升。NVIDIA作為AI晶片和CUDA軟體生態系統的領導者，自然被視為這波浪潮的最大受益者。這項預測不僅顯示了NVIDIA對自身技術領先地位的信心，也暗示了整個AI產業未來幾年的巨大成長潛力，對相關供應鏈如台積電等都會有深遠影響。

level3_translation.sentence: Early optimism shifted to a historic energy shock caused by US-Israeli strikes on Iran.
level3_translation.translation: 早期市場的樂觀情緒，因美國與以色列對伊朗的襲擊引發的歷史性能源危機而轉變。

level3_translation.sentence: Global equities dropped 3.2% in USD, with US equities falling 4.6%, and value stocks outperformed growth stocks as the rotation away from mega-cap tech accelerated due to AI fears.
level3_translation.translation: 全球股市以美元計價下跌3.2%，其中美國股市下跌4.6%，而由於市場對AI的擔憂加速了資金從大型科技股撤出，價值股的表現優於成長股。

level3_translation.translation: 該策略在當季以及截至2026年3月31日的過去12個月中，表現均超越了基準指數。

level3_translation.sentence: Exposure in North America, Korea, Western Europe, and Latin America regions boosted performance, while Canada and the UK lagged.

level3_translation.translation: 能源、非必需消費品、工業和醫療保健等產業板塊引領了績效，而金融、房地產和原物料則表現不佳。

level3_translation.translation: 為了管理風險，該公司在本季增加了對防禦型產業的持股。

level3_translation.sentence: One-month return of NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) was -8.76%, and its shares gained 26.10% over the past 52 weeks.

level3_translation.sentence: NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) has a market capitalization of $4.74 trillion.

level3_translation.sentence: Antipodes Global Value Strategy stated the following regarding NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) in its Q1 2026 investor letter:
level3_translation.translation: Antipodes全球價值策略在其2026年第一季投資人信函中，針對輝達公司（NASDAQ:NVDA）發表了以下看法：

level3_translation.sentence: "NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA): The opportunity in NVIDIA has been created from the market's extrapolation of near-term AI uncertainty, despite a structural demand inflection for the world's dominant AI infrastructure provider.
level3_translation.translation: 「輝達公司（NASDAQ:NVDA）：儘管全球領先的AI基礎設施供應商面臨結構性的需求拐點，但市場對短期AI不確定性的過度推斷，為輝達創造了投資機會。

level3_translation.sentence: On our estimates NVDA trades on a 2027 multiple of 13x.
level3_translation.translation: 根據我們的估計，輝達（NVDA）在2027年的本益比為13倍。

level3_translation.sentence: Management now guides at least $1 trillion in AI infrastructure demand through 2027 — double the $500bn signalled twelve months ago — and frames this as a floor with NVDA the main beneficiary underpinned by the CUDA installed base.
level3_translation.translation: 管理層現在預計，到2027年，AI基礎設施的需求將至少達到1兆美元——這比12個月前預期的5千億美元翻了一倍——並將此視為一個底線，而輝達憑藉其CUDA生態系統的龐大用戶基礎，將是主要受益者。

level3_translation.sentence: Revenue is also diversifying beyond hyperscalers, with sovereign clouds, enterprise, and robotics growing while the SaaS-to-agentic transition represents a further enterprise IT monetisation opportunity."
level3_translation.translation: 營收來源也正從超大規模雲端服務供應商（hyperscalers）之外多元化發展，主權雲、企業應用和機器人領域都在成長，而從軟體即服務（SaaS）到代理式（agentic）的轉變，則代表了企業IT進一步的變現機會。」

level3_translation.translation: 輝達公司（NASDAQ:NVDA）在我們列出的「2026年對沖基金最受歡迎的40檔股票」榜單中排名第四。

level3_translation.translation: 根據我們的資料庫顯示，在第四季結束時，共有275個對沖基金投資組合持有輝達公司（NASDAQ:NVDA），相較於前一季的264個有所增加。

level3_translation.sentence: In the first quarter of fiscal year 2027, NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ: NVDA) reported revenues of $82 billion, achieving an impressive 85% year-over-year growth.
level3_translation.translation: 在2027會計年度的第一季，輝達公司（NASDAQ:NVDA）公布營收達820億美元，實現了令人印象深刻的85%年增長率。

level3_translation.sentence: While we acknowledge the potential of NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk.
level3_translation.translation: 儘管我們認可輝達公司（NASDAQ:NVDA）作為一項投資的潛力，但我們認為某些AI股票能提供更大的上漲潛力，且下行風險較低。

level3_translation.translation: 如果您正在尋找一檔被嚴重低估，且有望從川普時代關稅和在地化生產趨勢中顯著受益的AI股票，請參閱我們關於最佳短期AI股票的免費報告。

level3_translation.sentence: In another article, we covered NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) and shared the list of best AI chip stocks to buy for the long term.
level3_translation.translation: 在另一篇文章中，我們報導了輝達公司（NASDAQ:NVDA），並分享了值得長期投資的最佳AI晶片股票清單。

level3_translation.sentence: In addition, please check out our hedge fund investor letters Q1 2026 page for more investor letters from hedge funds and other leading investors.
level3_translation.translation: 此外，請查閱我們的「對沖基金投資人信函2026年第一季」頁面，以獲取更多來自對沖基金和其他領先投資者的信函。

level3_translation.sentence: READ NEXT: 33 Stocks That Should Double in 3 Years and 15 Stocks That Will Make You Rich in 10 Years.
level3_translation.translation: 接下來閱讀：『3年內有望翻倍的33檔股票』以及『10年內讓你致富的15檔股票』。

english_professor_news.title: Soybean Oil Prices Fall as Crude Oil Slides Lower. 1 Trade to Make Here.

level1_blind.text:
September soybean oil (ZLU26) futures present a selling opportunity on more price weakness.

See on the daily bar chart for the September soybean oil futures that prices are trending lower. See at the bottom of the chart that the moving average convergence divergence (MACD) indicator is also in a bearish mode as the blue MACD line is below the red trigger line and both lines are trending down.

Fundamentally, crude oil (CBQ26) (CLQ26) prices are sliding lower, which is also bearish for bean oil. Also, spreaders who had earlier initiated long bean oil, short meal (ZMU26) spreads, will have to start unwinding those spreads at some point, and probably sooner rather than later. That would be bearish for bean oil.

A move in the September bean oil futures below chart support at the June low of 65.90 cents would become a selling opportunity. The downside price objective would be 55.00 cents, or below. Technical resistance, for which to place a protective buy stop just above, is located at 70.00 cents.

IMPORTANT NOTE: I am not a futures broker and do not manage any trading accounts other than my own personal account. It is my goal to point out to you potential trading opportunities. However, it is up to you to: (1) decide when and if you want to initiate any trades and (2) determine the size of any trades you may initiate. Any trades I discuss are hypothetical in nature.

Here is what the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) has said about futures trading (and I agree 100%):

On the date of publication, Jim Wyckoff did not have (either directly or indirectly) positions in any of the securities mentioned in this article. All information and data in this article is solely for informational purposes. This article was originally published on Barchart.com

level2_keywords.meaning: 一種金融衍生性商品，買賣雙方約定在未來某個特定日期，以特定價格交割特定數量的商品或金融資產。
level2_keywords.example: Soybean oil futures are actively traded on commodity exchanges.

level2_keywords.meaning: 形容市場或資產價格預期會下跌的趨勢，與『看漲』或『牛市』相對。
level2_keywords.example: The analyst issued a bearish outlook for crude oil prices.

level2_keywords.meaning: 移動平均線收斂發散指標，一種技術分析指標，用於判斷股價或商品價格的趨勢變化、動能和潛在買賣點。
level2_keywords.example: Traders often use the MACD indicator to identify potential trend reversals.

level2_keywords.meaning: 指兩種相關資產之間的價格差異，或是一種同時買入和賣出不同到期日或不同履約價的期貨/選擇權策略。
level2_keywords.example: Commodity traders often use spreads to hedge their positions or speculate on price differences.

level2_keywords.meaning: 技術分析中的一個價格水平，通常認為資產價格在此水平會遇到賣壓，難以繼續上漲。
level2_keywords.example: The stock price faced strong resistance at the 70-dollar level.

english_professor_news.level2_context: 各位同學，這篇新聞主要在討論大宗商品市場中的『黃豆油期貨』。我們都知道，原油價格的波動會對許多相關商品產生影響，因為黃豆油除了食用外，也常被用於生質燃料，所以它的價格走勢會與原油有一定程度的連動。當原油價格下跌時，通常會對黃豆油的價格形成壓力。這篇文章結合了技術分析（例如 MACD 指標和支撐/阻力位）與基本面分析（原油價格下跌、價差交易者平倉），來判斷黃豆油期貨可能出現一個『賣出機會』。這對於從事商品期貨交易的投資人來說，是一個重要的市場訊號。

level3_translation.sentence: September soybean oil (ZLU26) futures present a selling opportunity on more price weakness.
level3_translation.translation: 九月黃豆油（ZLU26）期貨在價格進一步走弱時，呈現一個賣出機會。

level3_translation.sentence: See on the daily bar chart for the September soybean oil futures that prices are trending lower.
level3_translation.translation: 從九月黃豆油期貨的日線圖上可以看到，價格正呈現下跌趨勢。

level3_translation.sentence: See at the bottom of the chart that the moving average convergence divergence (MACD) indicator is also in a bearish mode as the blue MACD line is below the red trigger line and both lines are trending down.
level3_translation.translation: 在圖表底部，我們可以看到移動平均線收斂發散（MACD）指標也處於空頭模式，因為藍色的 MACD 線位於紅色的訊號線下方，且兩條線都呈現下降趨勢。

level3_translation.sentence: Fundamentally, crude oil (CBQ26) (CLQ26) prices are sliding lower, which is also bearish for bean oil.
level3_translation.translation: 從基本面來看，原油（CBQ26）（CLQ26）價格正在下滑，這對黃豆油來說也是一個看跌的訊號。

level3_translation.sentence: Also, spreaders who had earlier initiated long bean oil, short meal (ZMU26) spreads, will have to start unwinding those spreads at some point, and probably sooner rather than later.
level3_translation.translation: 此外，先前建立『買入黃豆油、賣出黃豆粉（ZMU26）』價差部位的交易者，遲早會開始平倉這些部位。

level3_translation.sentence: That would be bearish for bean oil.
level3_translation.translation: 這將會對黃豆油的價格造成看跌壓力。

level3_translation.sentence: A move in the September bean oil futures below chart support at the June low of 65.90 cents would become a selling opportunity.
level3_translation.translation: 如果九月黃豆油期貨價格跌破六月低點 65.90 美分的圖表支撐位，將會形成一個賣出機會。

level3_translation.sentence: The downside price objective would be 55.00 cents, or below.
level3_translation.translation: 下行的價格目標將會是 55.00 美分，甚至更低。

level3_translation.sentence: Technical resistance, for which to place a protective buy stop just above, is located at 70.00 cents.
level3_translation.translation: 技術阻力位，也就是可以設定保護性買入止損點的位置，則位於 70.00 美分。

level3_translation.sentence: IMPORTANT NOTE: I am not a futures broker and do not manage any trading accounts other than my own personal account.
level3_translation.translation: 重要提醒：我並非期貨經紀人，除了我自己的個人帳戶外，不管理任何交易帳戶。

level3_translation.sentence: It is my goal to point out to you potential trading opportunities.
level3_translation.translation: 我的目標是向各位同學指出潛在的交易機會。

level3_translation.sentence: However, it is up to you to: (1) decide when and if you want to initiate any trades and (2) determine the size of any trades you may initiate.
level3_translation.translation: 然而，最終還是由各位同學自行決定：(1) 何時以及是否要啟動任何交易，以及 (2) 決定您可能啟動的任何交易的規模。

level3_translation.sentence: Any trades I discuss are hypothetical in nature.
level3_translation.translation: 我討論的任何交易本質上都是假設性的。

level3_translation.sentence: Here is what the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) has said about futures trading (and I agree 100%):
level3_translation.translation: 以下是美國商品期貨交易委員會（CFTC）對於期貨交易的說明（我百分之百同意）：

level3_translation.sentence: On the date of publication, Jim Wyckoff did not have (either directly or indirectly) positions in any of the securities mentioned in this article.
level3_translation.translation: 截至發布日期，Jim Wyckoff 並未直接或間接持有本文提及的任何證券部位。

level3_translation.sentence: All information and data in this article is solely for informational purposes.
level3_translation.translation: 本文中的所有資訊與數據僅供參考。

level3_translation.sentence: This article was originally published on Barchart.com
level3_translation.translation: 這篇文章最初發布於 Barchart.com。

english_professor_news.title: Dear Google Stock Fans, Mark Your Calendars for June 29

level1_blind.text:
The above button links to Coinbase. Yahoo Finance is not a broker-dealer or investment adviser and does not offer securities or cryptocurrencies for sale or facilitate trading. Coinbase pays us for certain activity generated through this link. Prices displayed are informational.

Alphabet (GOOG) (GOOGL), one of the foremost names in the tech industry and now a very consequential player in the AI race, will see its shares added to the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI) on June 29. The parent company of Google will replace telecommunications major Verizon (VZ).

After it seemed that it could do no wrong, Google has suddenly been hit from all sides, with GOOG stock having its worst day in a year. While latent fears around the capex story remained, what triggered the latest fall was the departure of two key AI researchers, Noam Shazeer and John Jumper. Shazeer, who was a co-lead of the Gemini AI models, departed to join fierce rival OpenAI. And Jumper, the creator of the AI system AlphaFold, joined the current market leader, Anthropic.

Corning Stock Skyrockets on AI-Related Demand, Spurring Unusual Call Option Buying

AMD's MEXT Acquisition Is More Important Than Markets Realize. Here's How It Solves the Memory Bottleneck.

The so-called brain drain has had mixed results in the cutthroat world of AI, though, recently. Nobody can deny the success story that is Anthropic, which was started by Dario Amodei after leaving OpenAI. Yet, Meta's (META) AI efforts remain pale in comparison to others, even after a $14.2 billion investment in Scale AI.

But I digress. No matter the size of the company, inclusion in one of the oldest and most reputable indices in the world is certainly a positive for Google. With AI capex showing no signs of slowing down, inclusion in the Dow can have the indirect beneficial effect of low borrowing costs for the company in the future.

However, investors should curb their expectations of an immediate rebound in the company's shares solely based on this development if history is any indication.

level2_keywords.meaning: 資本支出。指企業用於購買、升級或維護實物資產（如建築物、機器設備）的資金。
level2_keywords.example: The company's aggressive「capex」plan signals strong future growth expectations.

level2_keywords.meaning: 電信業。指透過電纜、光纖或無線電波等技術進行遠距離通訊的產業。
level2_keywords.example: The「telecommunications」sector is undergoing rapid transformation with the rollout of 5G technology.

level2_keywords.meaning: 買權。一種金融衍生品，賦予持有人在特定時間內以特定價格購買標的資產的權利，而非義務。
level2_keywords.example: Investors often buy「call options」when they anticipate a significant rise in a stock's price.

level2_keywords.meaning: 收購。指一家公司購買另一家公司的全部或大部分股份，以獲得控制權的商業行為。
level2_keywords.example: The tech giant's latest「acquisition」aims to strengthen its position in the cloud computing market.

level2_keywords.meaning: 反彈。指股價、經濟活動或其他市場指標在下跌後迅速回升。
level2_keywords.example: After a sharp decline, the stock market showed a strong「rebound」driven by positive economic data.

english_professor_news.level2_context: 各位同學，這則新聞主要在講科技巨頭 Alphabet（也就是 Google 的母公司）即將被納入道瓊工業指數。道瓊指數是美國歷史最悠久、最具代表性的股票指數之一，通常納入的都是美國經濟中舉足輕重的藍籌股。被納入道瓊指數，對一家公司來說，不僅是市場地位的肯定，也意味著其股票會被更多追蹤指數的基金買入，有助於提升流動性和降低未來的融資成本。這對 Google 來說是個好消息，尤其是在它近期面臨一些挑戰之後，像是關鍵 AI 研究人員的流失，以及在激烈 AI 競爭中需要投入大量資本支出（capex）的情況。這也反映出美國經濟結構的轉變，從傳統電信業（Verizon）轉向更具創新力的科技巨頭。

level3_translation.sentence: The above button links to Coinbase.
level3_translation.translation: 「上方按鈕連結至 Coinbase 平台。」

level3_translation.sentence: Yahoo Finance is not a broker-dealer or investment adviser and does not offer securities or cryptocurrencies for sale or facilitate trading.
level3_translation.translation: 「Yahoo 財經並非證券經紀商或投資顧問，不提供證券或加密貨幣的銷售服務，也不協助交易。」

level3_translation.sentence: Coinbase pays us for certain activity generated through this link.
level3_translation.translation: 「Coinbase 會針對透過此連結產生的特定活動支付費用給我們。」

level3_translation.sentence: Prices displayed are informational.
level3_translation.translation: 「所顯示的價格僅供參考。」

level3_translation.sentence: Alphabet (GOOG) (GOOGL), one of the foremost names in the tech industry and now a very consequential player in the AI race, will see its shares added to the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI) on June 29.
level3_translation.translation: 「科技產業的領頭羊、同時也是 AI 競賽中極具影響力的參與者 Alphabet（股票代號 GOOG, GOOGL），其股票將於 6 月 29 日被納入道瓊工業指數（$DOWI）。」

level3_translation.sentence: The parent company of Google will replace telecommunications major Verizon (VZ).
level3_translation.translation: 「這家 Google 的母公司將取代電信巨頭 Verizon（股票代號 VZ）。」

level3_translation.sentence: After it seemed that it could do no wrong, Google has suddenly been hit from all sides, with GOOG stock having its worst day in a year.
level3_translation.translation: 「在過去看似無往不利之後，Google 突然間四面受敵，其 GOOG 股票經歷了一年來表現最差的一天。」

level3_translation.sentence: While latent fears around the capex story remained, what triggered the latest fall was the departure of two key AI researchers, Noam Shazeer and John Jumper.
level3_translation.translation: 「儘管市場對其資本支出（capex）的隱憂持續存在，但近期股價下跌的導火線，是兩位關鍵 AI 研究員 Noam Shazeer 和 John Jumper 的離職。」

level3_translation.sentence: Shazeer, who was a co-lead of the Gemini AI models, departed to join fierce rival OpenAI.
level3_translation.translation: 「曾是 Gemini AI 模型共同負責人的 Shazeer，已離職並轉投其主要競爭對手 OpenAI。」

level3_translation.sentence: And Jumper, the creator of the AI system AlphaFold, joined the current market leader, Anthropic.
level3_translation.translation: 「而 AI 系統 AlphaFold 的創建者 Jumper，則加入了目前的市場領導者 Anthropic。」

level3_translation.sentence: Corning Stock Skyrockets on AI-Related Demand, Spurring Unusual Call Option Buying
level3_translation.translation: 「康寧（Corning）股價因 AI 相關需求而飆升，引發了異常的買權（call option）交易活動。」

level3_translation.sentence: AMD's MEXT Acquisition Is More Important Than Markets Realize. Here's How It Solves the Memory Bottleneck.
level3_translation.translation: 「超微（AMD）收購 MEXT 的重要性超乎市場預期，這篇文章將解釋它如何解決記憶體瓶頸問題。」

level3_translation.sentence: The so-called brain drain has had mixed results in the cutthroat world of AI, though, recently.
level3_translation.translation: 「然而，在競爭激烈的 AI 領域中，這種所謂的『人才流失』近期卻帶來了喜憂參半的結果。」

level3_translation.sentence: Nobody can deny the success story that is Anthropic, which was started by Dario Amodei after leaving OpenAI.
level3_translation.translation: 「無人能否認 Anthropic 的成功故事，這家公司是由 Dario Amodei 離開 OpenAI 後創立的。」

level3_translation.sentence: Yet, Meta's (META) AI efforts remain pale in comparison to others, even after a $14.2 billion investment in Scale AI.
level3_translation.translation: 「然而，即使在對 Scale AI 投入了 142 億美元之後，Meta（股票代號 META）的 AI 發展成果與其他公司相比仍顯得黯淡。」

level3_translation.sentence: But I digress.
level3_translation.translation: 「不過，我離題了。」

level3_translation.sentence: No matter the size of the company, inclusion in one of the oldest and most reputable indices in the world is certainly a positive for Google.
level3_translation.translation: 「無論公司規模大小，被納入全球歷史最悠久、最受推崇的指數之一，對 Google 來說絕對是個利多消息。」

level3_translation.sentence: With AI capex showing no signs of slowing down, inclusion in the Dow can have the indirect beneficial effect of low borrowing costs for the company in the future.
level3_translation.translation: 「隨著 AI 相關的資本支出（capex）沒有放緩跡象，被納入道瓊指數，未來能為公司帶來間接降低借貸成本的益處。」

level3_translation.sentence: However, investors should curb their expectations of an immediate rebound in the company's shares solely based on this development if history is any indication.
level3_translation.translation: 「然而，如果以歷史經驗來看，投資人若僅憑此一發展就期待公司股價立即反彈，應當適度抑制其預期。」

market_linker_insight.violence_connection:
今日台股籌碼動向與國際科技新聞的暴力聯結，揭示了市場大戶在AI浪潮下的精準佈局與分歧判斷。在NVIDIA預估2027年AI基礎設施需求將達1兆美元的重磅利多消息於盤後見報前，台股盤中已見主力資金的提前異動。外資與自營商不約而同地大買聯電（2303），這可能預示著他們已嗅到AI晶片需求激增將帶動整體半導體供應鏈，即使聯電並非最尖端的AI晶片製造商，其成熟製程與周邊IC需求仍將受惠。這與投信大賣聯電形成鮮明對比，或許反映了機構法人對聯電在AI核心競爭力上的不同評估，或是在高點進行獲利了結。

更值得注意的是，投信在盤中大舉買進華邦電（2344）與南亞科（2408）等記憶體廠，而外資則大賣力積電（6770）與旺宏（2337）。這看似矛盾的行為，實則可能是對AI記憶體需求爆發的提前卡位。NVIDIA的兆元預期不僅限於GPU，更涵蓋了對高頻寬記憶體（HBM）及其他相關記憶體元件的龐大需求。投信的買盤可能押注於記憶體產業的全面復甦，認為即使非HBM主流供應商，也能在AI帶動的整體記憶體需求增長中分一杯羹。而外資對部分記憶體股的賣超，則可能是基於對特定公司產品線或市場競爭力的考量，進行汰弱留強，將資金轉向更具潛力的標的，例如他們買進的聯電。

這種時間差與資金流向的錯綜複雜，強烈暗示部分大戶已透過其資訊優勢，在國際利多消息曝光前，就對台股相關供應鏈進行了戰略性部署，展現了市場聯結器預測未來趨勢的敏銳嗅覺。
